abort.already_configured: This device has already been configured with this infrared emitter.
abort.no_infrared_entities: No infrared emitter entities found. Please set up an infrared emitter (e.g. via ESPHome) first.

user.title: Set up HeatpumpIR
user.description: Select your heat pump or fan model and the infrared emitter that will control it.

data_description.model: The brand and model of your heat pump or fan unit.
data_description.infrared_entity_id: The infrared emitter entity to use for sending commands.

init.title: Heatpump Infrared options
init.description: IR emitters send commands one-way, so there's no built-in confirmation that the unit responded. Optionally point this at a temperature sensor near the unit so its reading is shown as the current temperature — giving you feedback that the unit is actually reacting.

data_description.temperature_sensor_entity_id: A sensor entity reporting the room temperature near this unit. Leave blank to disable.
